channel.title: Comments on: Brewery Ommegang, Ommegeddon, Ep. 71
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: Ommegeddon « Beer Search Party
item.dc:creator: Ommegeddon « Beer Search Party
item.description: [...] September 4, 2009 by beersearchparty Beer America TV [...]
item.content:encoded: […] September 4, 2009 by beersearchparty Beer America TV […]

item.title: By: Ryan
item.dc:creator: Ryan
item.description: I love the Ommegang beers but I haven't had this one yet. I have been thinking about trying this beer but haven't gotten around to it yet. You guys have made me want to try this beer very badly. lol
item.content:encoded: I love the Ommegang beers but I haven’t had this one yet. I have been thinking about trying this beer but haven’t gotten around to it yet. You guys have made me want to try this beer very badly. lol

item.title: By: David
item.dc:creator: David
item.description: It took over 3 minutes for someone to say "witch hazel" or "Juicy Fruit!" I sure see a trend in the beers we like, huh?
item.content:encoded: It took over 3 minutes for someone to say “witch hazel” or “Juicy Fruit!” I sure see a trend in the beers we like, huh?
